mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id, term_status, term_locked_at, term_locked_by_subject_id, term_unlocked_at, term_unlocked_by_user_id FROM t_tenant_term_state WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_tenant_term_state( tenant_id, term_status, term_locked_at, term_locked_by_subject_id, term_unlocked_at, term_unlocked_by_user_id ) VALUES(#{tenantId}, 2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{subjectId}, NULL, NULL) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id) DO UPDATE SET term_status = 2, term_locked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, term_locked_by_subject_id = EXCLUDED.term_locked_by_subject_id, term_unlocked_at = NULL, term_unlocked_by_user_id = NULL, version = t_tenant_term_state.version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE t_tenant_term_state SET term_status = 1, term_unlocked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, term_unlocked_by_user_id = #{confirmedByUserId}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
